message:
chore(reports): refresh conformance and perf budget reports after CI fixes

Regenerated test reports after recent CI stability fixes (Windows
drive-letter path support, conformance summary overwrite prevention).

Conformance reports:
- Timestamps updated to 06:24:27Z / 06:26:22Z / 06:26:47Z
- No test result changes (all pass/fail counts identical)

Performance budgets:
- event_dispatch_p99: 47us -> 45us (natural variance, well within 5000us budget)
- idle_memory_rss: 4.20MB -> 4.23MB (natural variance, well within 50MB budget)
- binary_size_release: changed from PASS (13.0MB) to NO_DATA — release
  binary not present in this build context (not a regression, just a
  different build environment without release artifacts)
- CI-enforced with data: 2 -> 1 (reflects binary_size going to NO_DATA)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
